description: Triage-recovery agent step schemas. Single closure step that strips orphan workflow labels from OPEN issues that both pipelines skip: triager skips any workflow-labeled issue; orchestrator skips any issue without an actionable-phase label. Eligible set and orphan labels are derived dynamically from the workflow JSON (no hardcoded label names).

recover.description: Recover closure step response. Strips the terminal label from each orphan OPEN issue so triager can re-pick it on the next run.

summary.description: One-line human-readable summary (e.g., 'stripped workflow labels from 5 orphan issues; 0 skipped').

action.description: Closure intent. 'closing' terminates the recovery pass. 'repeat' re-runs the step when the first fetch/edit needs another pass (transient gh failure, paging).

removed.description: Per-(issue, label) result of successful `gh issue edit --remove-label` application. One entry per stripped label — an issue carrying multiple orphan workflow labels yields multiple entries with the same issue_number. Empty array is valid (no orphan issues found).

removed_label.description: Workflow label stripped from the issue (an orphan label: member of WORKFLOW_LABELS but not ACTIONABLE_LABELS).

skipped.description: Issues that matched the orphan query but were not edited. Each entry records why (e.g., gh permission denied, label already absent on refetch).

reason.description: Free-form reason the issue was skipped.
